urls.title: LinkedIn Jobs Search URLs
urls.description: One or more LinkedIn Jobs search URLs from the public LinkedIn jobs search page.

count.title: Max jobs to scrape
count.description: Upper limit on the number of job listings to fetch from LinkedIn.

scrapeCompany.title: Scrape company details
scrapeCompany.description: Fetch full company metadata for each job (requires extra HTTP requests; slower).

splitByLocation.title: Split search by city
splitByLocation.description: Break the search into per-city queries to bypass LinkedIn's ~1 000-result cap.

splitCountry.title: Country to split by
splitCountry.description: Required when 'Split search by city' is enabled. Two-letter ISO country code.
